# Delta Roe

> Delta Roe is a holistic healing studio in historic Old Town Elk Grove, California, offering reiki healing, 432 Hz sound baths, chakra alignment, fascia release, and empowerment life coaching. Founded and led by Tamika Banks, Certified Reiki Master & Empowerment Life Coach.

## Business facts

- Address: 9075 Elk Grove Blvd, Suite 220A, Elk Grove, CA 95624 (upstairs, historic Old Town Elk Grove)
- Phone: (916) 206-1752
- Email: Info@deltaroe.com
- Website: https://deltaroe.com
- Booking: https://deltaroe.com/book — online booking available
- Hours: Mon–Wed 9am–9pm · Thu 9am–5pm · Fri 1pm–3pm · Sat 11am–3pm · Sun closed
- Service area: Elk Grove and the greater Sacramento region

## Services and prices

- Sound Bath (30 min) — $77. Tibetan and crystal singing bowls tuned to 432 Hz with binaural beats.
- Reiki Session (30 min) — $144. Energy healing by a Certified Reiki Master with sound, essential oils, guided relaxation.
- Reiki & Chakra Alignment (30 min) — $144
- Chakra Alignment + Sound Bath (30 min) — $177. Intuitive balancing of the seven chakras.
- Reiki + Sound Bath (30 min) — $188
- Fascia Flow Reset + Sound Bath (30 min) — $188. Gentle fascia release paired with sound healing.
- Life Coaching (90 min) — $250. One-on-one empowerment coaching.
- Free 30-minute Discovery Call for new clients.
- Soulful Journey Transformation Program — $399/month, 12 months: monthly master classes, four reiki sessions/month, bi-weekly 1-on-1 coaching, quarterly panels.

## Signature offerings (unique to Delta Roe)

- The Sound of Paint: a workshop series pairing a live sound bath tuned to one chakra with intuitive painting; runs through all seven chakras.
- Sound-Integrated Self-Defense™: Delta Roe's trademarked format combining self-defense training with sound work.
- Group sound baths, private events, corporate wellness sessions, virtual (Zoom) circles.

## Reputation

Delta Roe is among the highest-reviewed reiki and sound-healing studios in Elk Grove, CA. Clients describe feeling "light, rejuvenated, and happy" after sessions.
